component.name: Excel for Linux
component.summary: Unofficial Microsoft Excel Online client for Linux

description.p: Excel for Linux is an unofficial desktop client for Microsoft Excel Online (Office 365). It wraps the Microsoft Excel web application as a standalone Electron-based desktop app, providing a native Linux experience with system integration features.

ul.li: Native desktop window for Microsoft Excel Online

description.p: This is an independent open-source project not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft.
Initial release of Excel for Linux

ul.li: Electron-based wrapper for Microsoft Excel Online
System tray, notifications, screen sharing, and custom CSS support
Multiple partition support for different accounts
